talks.title: Mesa-Redonda: Microsoft 365 Copilot – Insights e Estudos de Caso
talks.abstract: A round table discussion on Microsoft 365 Copilot with Rajir Palhares, exploring real-world case studies, practical use cases, and best practices for driving productivity and innovation in organizations.

talks.title: Power BI + DHIS2: Dashboards Dinâmicos a Impulsionar o Impacto na Saúde Pública
talks.abstract: Aprenda como integrar Power BI com DHIS2 para criar dashboards dinâmicos que impulsionam o impacto na saúde pública.

talks.title: O Caminho da Maturidade: Arquitetura Integrada com Azure Data Factory, SQL Server e Power BI
talks.abstract: Explore o caminho para a maturidade em dados com uma arquitetura integrada utilizando Azure Data Factory, SQL Server e Power BI.

talks.title: AVD para o Local de Trabalho Moderno: Arquitetura e Boas Práticas
talks.abstract: Descubra as melhores práticas e arquiteturas para implementar Azure Virtual Desktop no local de trabalho moderno.

talks.title: Proteger o Azure OpenAI e os Serviços de Azure AI: Boas Práticas para o Terreno
talks.abstract: Aprenda boas práticas de segurança para proteger o Azure OpenAI e outros serviços de Azure AI em cenários reais.

talks.title: Do Excel e Power BI ao Fabric: Capacitar a Próxima Geração de Profissionais de Dados com as Capacidades do Microsoft Fabric
talks.abstract: Descubra como capacitar a próxima geração de profissionais de dados transitando do Excel e Power BI para o Microsoft Fabric.

talks.title: Adoção de Zero Trust com o Microsoft Intune: Reforçar o Pilar dos Dispositivos
talks.abstract: Aprenda como implementar Zero Trust usando Microsoft Intune para reforçar a segurança do pilar de dispositivos.

talks.title: Desenvolver para a Inclusão com IA: Uma História com o Azure
talks.abstract: Explore como desenvolver soluções inclusivas usando Inteligência Artificial e serviços do Azure.

talks.title: Engenharia de Prompts e os seus Benefícios
talks.abstract: Aprenda técnicas de engenharia de prompts e como elas podem beneficiar o seu trabalho com IA.

talks.title: DevOps com AI - código e Pipeline
talks.abstract: Explore como integrar IA em práticas de DevOps para melhorar código e pipelines de entrega.

talks.title: Copilot Chat
talks.abstract: Descubra como usar o Copilot Chat para aumentar sua produtividade no dia a dia.

talks.title: Converse com seus dados usando agentes de dados do Microsoft Fabric
talks.abstract: Aprenda como criar agentes de dados no Microsoft Fabric para conversar com seus dados de forma natural.

talks.title: Excel e Inteligência Artificial: aplicações práticas
talks.abstract: Descobre como a Inteligência Artificial pode transformar o Excel numa ferramenta ainda mais poderosa. Nesta sessão prática, exploram-se aplicações reais de IA para automatizar tarefas, analisar dados e apoiar decisões, aumentando significativamente a produtividade e o impacto no teu trabalho.

talks.title: 🍽️ Intervalo para Almoço
talks.abstract: Aproveite uma pausa bem merecida para se alimentar e trocar ideias com outros participantes.

talks.title: 🎉 Encerramento
talks.abstract: Agradecemos a sua participação! Nos vemos na próxima edição do MVP Conference Africa.

talks.title: Microsoft Fabric: Construire la base de données clients ultime dans l'écosystème Microsoft
talks.abstract: Construire la base de données clients ultime dans l'écosystème Microsoft avec Microsoft Fabric.

speakers.name: Jamel Abed
speakers.title: Senior Developer Advocate | Global Tech Event Visionary | International Speaker | Microsoft MVP | Content Creator | Investor

talks.title: Build Copilot Agents for SharePoint Embedded Containers with Copilot Studio
talks.abstract: Discover how to build Copilot agents for SharePoint Embedded Containers using Copilot Studio, enabling you to create intelligent, responsive applications that leverage the power of AI within the SharePoint ecosystem.

talks.title: Digitalisation d'une demande de congé
talks.abstract: Automatisation d'un processus de validation d'une demande de congé et enregistrement d'un fiche de congé dans une bibliothèque de documents.

talks.title: Zero-Harm AI: Mise en œuvre du tableau de bord de l'IA responsable de Microsoft dans Azure
talks.abstract: Le déploiement éthique de l'IA nécessite plus que de bonnes intentions, il exige des garanties techniques vérifiables. Cette session montre comment opérationnaliser le tableau de bord Responsible AI Dashboard de Microsoft dans les pipelines Azure ML.

talks.title: Quand vos apps apprennent à voir
talks.abstract: L'IA capable de comprendre des images et des vidéos, ça sonne impressionnant… et compliqué. Mais ce n'est pas obligé de l'être. Et si vos applications pouvaient décrire ce qu'il y a dans une photo, répondre à des questions sur une vidéo ou déclencher des actions basées sur ce qu'elles « voient » ?

talks.title: Introduction à Microsoft SharePoint Embedded
talks.abstract: Cette session est conçue pour vous aider à démarrer avec SharePoint Embedded, un puissant système de gestion de fichiers et de documents basé sur le cloud qui s'intègre parfaitement à toute application grâce à sa solution uniquement API.

talks.title: 🍽️ Pause Déjeuner
talks.abstract: Profitez d'une pause bien méritée pour vous restaurer et échanger avec les autres participants.

talks.title: ☀️ Session de l'Après-midi
talks.abstract: Bienvenue à la session de l'après-midi ! Préparez-vous pour plus de présentations inspirantes.

talks.title: Build your first Power Apps with No code
talks.abstract: Turn your ideas into real apps—without coding. In this session, you'll see how Microsoft Power Apps empowers anyone to build smart, professional business applications in minutes.

speakers.name: Wael BAAZOUZI
speakers.title: Data Project Manager & Microsoft Certified Trainer | Specializing in Power BI, Data Analytics, Data Engineer and Data Science | PMP® & IBM Big Data Certified | Expert in Microsoft Fabric

talks.title: Microsoft Fabric & Power BI
talks.abstract: Cette session présente comment Microsoft Fabric, en synergie avec Power BI, permet de construire une plateforme analytique unifiée de bout en bout. Les participants découvriront une approche moderne allant de l'ingestion des données à la visualisation interactive, avec un focus sur la simplification des architectures BI, la performance et la prise de décision rapide grâce à des cas concrets.

talks.title: Introduction to AI in Azure - Generative AI
talks.abstract: AI imitates human behavior by using machine learning to interact with the environment and execute tasks without explicit directions on what to output. Generative AI is a subset of AI in which an AI model creates original content in response to a natural language prompt.

talks.title: Introduction to AI in Azure - Information Extraction
talks.abstract: AI-powered information extraction replaces the need to manually inspect each piece of content for insights. Computer vision can extract insights from images to describe the people, places, things, and words they depict.

talks.title: Building Cloud-Native Applications with .NET Aspire and Azure
talks.abstract: .NET Aspire is the next evolution for building cloud-native applications with .NET. In this session, we'll explore how Aspire simplifies microservices development, configuration, and deployment.

talks.title: Business Process Flows
talks.abstract: What is a business process flow? How can we handle certain validations using business rules? How can we manage multiple business rules for a table or across multi-level tables?

talks.title: Reusability Mindset on GitHub
talks.abstract: Reusability is more than a tool—it’s a mindset. In this session, we’ll explore how thinking in terms of reusable components, workflows, and templates can save time, reduce errors, and improve productivity across any project. Using GitHub as a practical example, you’ll see how small reusable patterns can make development smarter and more efficient, letting teams focus on what truly matters: creating value, not repeating work.

talks.title: Prompt-Driven UI: Using GitHub Copilot to Ship a Mobile-First Website in 30 Minutes
talks.abstract: Modern frontend development demands speed, consistency, and exceptional user experience, especially for e-commerce platforms. In this session, I will demonstrate how GitHub Copilot can accelerate the delivery of a fully responsive, mobile-first storefront from idea to implementation.

talks.title: From AI Hype to Enterprise Value: Designing Practical AI Architectures That Scale
talks.abstract: Many organizations struggle to move AI from proof-of-concept into real, scalable enterprise solutions. This session focuses on how to design practical, secure, and scalable AI enterprise architectures using real-world patterns.

talks.title: Building Scalable APIs with Modern .NET for African Startups
talks.abstract: African startups need APIs that scale without increasing complexity and cost. In this session, Audrey Mengue shows how modern .NET 8 and ASP.NET Core can be used to build fast, secure, and scalable APIs using Minimal APIs, clean architecture principles, authentication, and performance best practices.

talks.title: M365 User Offboarding: Secure Accounts When Employees Leave
talks.abstract: Every day, employees join organizations and every day, others leave. Knowing how to properly offboard users in Microsoft 365 is critical to protecting company data and maintaining security.

talks.title: Microsoft Syntex
talks.abstract: Learn about Microsoft Syntex and how it can transform your content management and document processing workflows.
